title: Agent Harness explained in 8min..
summary: A video explanation of agent harness engineering covering the evolution from prompt engineering and context engineering to harness engineering, with discussion of system loops and architecture. The content positions harness engineering as a growing topic requiring clarification within agentic AI systems.
